name: Switch
description: A boolean toggle for enabling or disabling a setting. Use when toggling takes immediate effect without a form submission.
instructions: Always pair with a Label for accessibility — connect via id/htmlFor or use aria-labelledby. The Switch has no hugWidth prop; control layout using flex containers (use flex + gap for compact, flex + justify-between for full-width label-switch rows). Use Checkbox instead when the toggle is part of a form submitted later.
